approved_command_preview: Run the approved DCOIR Review connector-safe modular refactor on the live GitHub checkout. The request creates a dedicated refactor branch from the clean pre-staging main base, splits active openrouter_pr_review runtime and large selftest entrypoints into scripts/dcoir_review package modules, splits openrouter-pr-review.yml into a thin caller plus reusable workflow, runs local selftests, pushes the branch, opens a draft PR, writes committed readback, and cleans up transient staging request/script files from main. It does not merge the PR and does not post external Codex comments.
